PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@newsflow.dev","password":"Password1!","displayName":"Test User"}' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object StatusCode, @{N='Body';E={$_.Content}})

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"test@newsflow.dev","password":"Password1!","displayName":"Test User"}' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"Test User","email":"test@newsflow.dev","password":"Password1!"}' -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })

PowerShell($wc = [System.Net.WebClient]::new\(\); try { $result = $wc.DownloadString\("http://localhost:5000/hangfire"\); "Dashboard status: 200 - Length: $\($result.Length\) chars" } catch [System.Net.WebException] { "Hangfire dashboard status: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })
